description: Get all glammed up in these heels from catwalk. The metallic forefoot strap with huge rhinestones lend this pair a dose of  style, making it a must have in your wardrobe.UpperMetallic synthetic leather forefoot strap with rhinestones for added style and snug FitSoft feel lining for extra comfortSynthetic leather and fabric lined ergonomic footbed for added style and comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured pattern on the forefoot and heel for better gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
